top3.sql:
SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2016'
  AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2016'
  AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH DrawCounts AS (
  SELECT l.id, l.name, COUNT(*) AS draw_count
  FROM League l
  JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
  WHERE m.season = '2016'
    AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
  GROUP BY l.id, l.name
)
SELECT name
FROM DrawCounts
ORDER BY draw_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2016'
  AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH DrawCounts AS (
  SELECT l.id, l.name, COUNT(*) AS draw_count
  FROM League l
  JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
  WHERE m.season = '2016'
    AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
  GROUP BY l.id, l.name
)
SELECT name
FROM DrawCounts
ORDER BY draw_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT l.name
FROM League l
JOIN Match m ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2016'
  AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
